comments: The last 21 minutes of the Friday Rock Show. On this show, Vance tells his listeners that Claire Sturgess will take over from him in 3 weeks time. She finally took over on 16th April 1993 after the Friday Rock Show was postponed on the 9th April 1993, due to a four hour concert on BBC Radio One. Tommy's last show was on 02 April 1993.
